C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\milestone1.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\milestone1.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\milestone1.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -march=native -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\milestone1.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o milestone1.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmilestone1.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\milestone1.dir\linkLibs.rsp
